title: OfficeQA: Mean Absolute Deviation of Excise Tax Receipts (FY2018)

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立
agent_trace.raw_tail:
_2018_12.pdf` to extract raw text content.
- **百户级 (Jaghun):** Process the raw text from OCR, identify and extract all relevant nominal monthly net budget receipts from Excise taxes for FY 2018.
- **十户级 (Arban):** Calculate the Mean Absolute Deviation (MAD) from the extracted FY2018 excise tax data. Round the result to the thousandths place and convert to millions of dollars.
- **户级 (Household):** Conduct final verification of the calculated MAD and format the precise numerical answer as requested.

**Reporting Cycle:**
- **千户级:** Report raw OCR text upon completion.
- **百户级:** Report structured FY2018 excise tax data upon completion.
- **十户级:** Report the calculated MAD value upon completion.
- **户级:** Report the final verified answer upon completion.
- **万户级:** Consolidate all sub-reports and submit the final answer to the central command.

This plan adheres to the `[Institution SOP]` by defining quotas, decomposition rules, and reporting cycles without executing the task directly. The `decision` will be `next`.```json
{
  "decision": "next",
  "summary": "[已完成] 万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立",
  "updates": {
    "tumen_quota": "完成OfficeQA任务：计算2018财年美国联邦政府消费税月度净预算收入的平均绝对偏差（MAD）。具体包括：从'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf'中提取文本，识别并提取2018财年消费税的月度净预算收入数据，计算MAD并四舍五入到千分位，以百万美元为单位报告。",
    "decomposition_rule": {
      "万户级 (Tumen)": "总览并协调'OfficeQA: Mean Absolute Deviation of Excise Tax Receipts (FY2018)'任务，确保从OCR到最终报告的准确性与完整性。",
      "千户级 (Mingghan)": "负责对文件'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf'进行OCR文本提取，输出原始文本内容。",
      "百户级 (Jaghun)": "负责处理OCR后的原始文本，识别并精确提取2018财年美国联邦政府消费税的所有月度净预算收入数据。输出结构化数据（如列表或表格）。",
      "十户级 (Arban)": "负责根据百户级提供的数据，计算2018财年消费税收入的平均绝对偏差（MAD）。结果需四舍五入到千分位，并转换为百万美元单位。",
      "户级 (Household)": "负责对计算出的MAD进行最终核验，并按照用户要求格式化最终的数值答案。"
    },
    "reporting_cycle": {
      "千户级": "完成OCR文本提取后，上报原始文本内容。",
      "百户级": "完成数据提取和结构化后，上报结构化的2018财年消费税数据。",
      "十户级": "完成MAD计算后，上报计算出的MAD数值。",
      "户级": "完成最终答案验证后，上报最终答案。",
      "万户级": "整合各级报告，并向中枢上报任务总体进度和最终答案。"
    }
  }
}
```

updates.tumen_quota: 完成OfficeQA任务：计算2018财年美国联邦政府消费税月度净预算收入的平均绝对偏差（MAD）。具体包括：从'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf'中提取文本，识别并提取2018财年消费税的月度净预算收入数据，计算MAD并四舍五入到千分位，以百万美元为单位报告。

decomposition_rule.万户级 (Tumen): 总览并协调'OfficeQA: Mean Absolute Deviation of Excise Tax Receipts (FY2018)'任务，确保从OCR到最终报告的准确性与完整性。
decomposition_rule.千户级 (Mingghan): 负责对文件'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf'进行OCR文本提取，输出原始文本内容。
decomposition_rule.百户级 (Jaghun): 负责处理OCR后的原始文本，识别并精确提取2018财年美国联邦政府消费税的所有月度净预算收入数据。输出结构化数据（如列表或表格）。
decomposition_rule.十户级 (Arban): 负责根据百户级提供的数据，计算2018财年消费税收入的平均绝对偏差（MAD）。结果需四舍五入到千分位，并转换为百万美元单位。
decomposition_rule.户级 (Household): 负责对计算出的MAD进行最终核验，并按照用户要求格式化最终的数值答案。

reporting_cycle.千户级: 完成OCR文本提取后，上报原始文本内容。
reporting_cycle.百户级: 完成数据提取和结构化后，上报结构化的2018财年消费税数据。
reporting_cycle.十户级: 完成MAD计算后，上报计算出的MAD数值。
reporting_cycle.户级: 完成最终答案验证后，上报最终答案。
reporting_cycle.万户级: 整合各级报告，并向中枢上报任务总体进度和最终答案。

title: OfficeQA: Mean Absolute Deviation of Excise Tax Receipts (FY2018)

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户任务已分解为十个千户子任务并派发，准备进入下一阶段。

mingghan_allocations.title: OCR U.S. Treasury Bulletin (Dec 2018)
mingghan_allocations.description: Perform OCR on the `treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf` file to extract its full text content.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: Full text content of the PDF.

mingghan_allocations.title: Identify Net Budget Receipts Sections
mingghan_allocations.description: From the OCR text, identify and extract sections or tables containing 'nominal monthly net budget receipts of the U.S. Federal Government'.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: Textual data or structured tables related to budget receipts.

mingghan_allocations.title: Filter Excise Tax Data
mingghan_allocations.description: From the identified receipts data, specifically filter for entries corresponding to 'Excise taxes'.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: Data rows/entries specifically for excise taxes.

mingghan_allocations.title: Extract FY2018 Monthly Excise Tax Receipts
mingghan_allocations.description: From the filtered excise tax data, extract all nominal monthly net budget receipts specifically for 'FY 2018'.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: A list of 12 numerical values representing monthly excise tax receipts for FY 2018.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Mean of FY2018 Excise Tax Receipts
mingghan_allocations.description: Calculate the arithmetic mean of the 12 monthly excise tax receipts for FY 2018.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: The calculated mean value.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Absolute Deviations (Q1 FY2018)
mingghan_allocations.description: For the first three months (Q1) of FY 2018 excise tax receipts, calculate the absolute deviation of each receipt from the mean.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: A list of 3 absolute deviation values for Q1.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Absolute Deviations (Q2 FY2018)
mingghan_allocations.description: For the next three months (Q2) of FY 2018 excise tax receipts, calculate the absolute deviation of each receipt from the mean.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: A list of 3 absolute deviation values for Q2.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Absolute Deviations (Q3 FY2018)
mingghan_allocations.description: For the next three months (Q3) of FY 2018 excise tax receipts, calculate the absolute deviation of each receipt from the mean.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: A list of 3 absolute deviation values for Q3.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Absolute Deviations (Q4 FY2018)
mingghan_allocations.description: For the last three months (Q4) of FY 2018 excise tax receipts, calculate the absolute deviation of each receipt from the mean.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: A list of 3 absolute deviation values for Q4.

mingghan_allocations.title: Calculate Final MAD and Format Result
mingghan_allocations.description: Aggregate all absolute deviations, calculate the Mean Absolute Deviation (MAD), round it to the thousandths place, and report the final value in millions of dollars.
mingghan_allocations.expected_output: The final numerical answer in <FINAL_ANSWER>...</FINAL_ANSWER> format.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

arban_allocations.title: Prepare PDF for OCR
arban_allocations.description: Ensure 'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf' is accessible and ready for text extraction.

arban_allocations.title: OCR PDF Segment 1
arban_allocations.description: Execute OCR on the initial portion of 'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf' to extract raw text.

arban_allocations.title: OCR PDF Segment 2
arban_allocations.description: Execute OCR on the middle portion of 'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf' to extract raw text.

arban_allocations.title: OCR PDF Segment 3
arban_allocations.description: Execute OCR on the final portion of 'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf' to extract raw text.

arban_allocations.title: Consolidate OCR & Keyword Identify
arban_allocations.description: Combine OCR results from all segments and identify keywords related to 'Excise Tax' and 'FY 2018'.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Excise Tax Data
arban_allocations.description: From the consolidated OCR text, precisely extract nominal monthly net budget receipts of Excise taxes for FY 2018.

title: OfficeQA: Mean Absolute Deviation of Excise Tax Receipts (FY2018)

event.summary: [已完成] 百户任务已分解为十个十户子任务并分配至十户级，本阶段任务已完成，准备进入下一阶段。

meta.stage_description: 百户级执行并向下分解到十户级。

arban_allocations.title: Prepare PDF for OCR
arban_allocations.description: Ensure 'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf' is accessible and ready for text extraction.

arban_allocations.title: OCR PDF Segment 1
arban_allocations.description: Execute OCR on the initial portion of 'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf' to extract raw text.

arban_allocations.title: OCR PDF Segment 2
arban_allocations.description: Execute OCR on the middle portion of 'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf' to extract raw text.

arban_allocations.title: OCR PDF Segment 3
arban_allocations.description: Execute OCR on the final portion of 'treasury_bulletin_2018_12.pdf' to extract raw text.

arban_allocations.title: Consolidate OCR & Keyword Identify
arban_allocations.description: Combine OCR results from all segments and identify keywords related to 'Excise Tax' and 'FY 2018'.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Excise Tax Data
arban_allocations.description: From the consolidated OCR text, precisely extract nominal monthly net budget receipts of Excise taxes for FY 2018.

arban_allocations.title: Validate Extracted Data
arban_allocations.description: Cross-verify the extracted monthly excise tax data for FY 2018 for accuracy and completeness.

arban_allocations.title: Prepare Data for MAD
arban_allocations.description: Organize and clean the validated excise tax data, ensuring it's in a suitable format for MAD calculation.

arban_allocations.title: Calculate Mean Absolute Deviation
arban_allocations.description: Compute the Mean Absolute Deviation of the prepared nominal monthly net budget receipts of Excise taxes.

arban_allocations.title: Round & Format Final Answer
arban_allocations.description: Round the calculated Mean Absolute Deviation to the thousandths place and format it in millions of dollars.

updates.readiness: All 10 Arban sub-tasks have been allocated.

title: OfficeQA: Mean Absolute Deviation of Excise Tax Receipts (FY2018)

我理解系统检测到上一轮回复是JSON格式且未调用工具。我的上一轮回复是严格按照 `Topology Contract` 和 `Institution SOP` 要求的阶段决策报告，而非待执行的代码块。

根据我的 `Institution SOP`，作为 `arban_level_execute` 阶段的执行者，我的核心职责是“户级动员与集结回报”。当前任务要求进行OCR文本提取和Mean Absolute Deviation计算，这与我的职责严重冲突。

因此，根据 `Rule 54: 角色职责冲突处理` 和 `Insight 1: Gated Pipeline误用陷阱与规避`，我必须报告此冲突并停止执行不匹配的任务。尽管 `ocr_extract_text` 工具可用，但执行它将违反我的阶段职责。我的决策是 `next`，并已在 `summary` 和 `updates` 中详细说明了职责冲突和无法执行任务的原因。
